title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Temuhub Ltd
body: "Application number 5172  Applicant Five Bells Limited and Whaleco UK Limited objected to the name used by Temuhub Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 7 April 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Temuhub Ltd is changed to 15400068, LTD. "
